# LogiMarket — B2B Marketplace & Knowledge Base

Canonical Site: https://logimarket.eu

## Description
LogiMarket is a B2B marketplace and procurement knowledge base for logistics, warehousing, intralogistics, and warehouse equipment. It operates under a hybrid interaction model, offering RFQ (request for quotation) for heavy equipment and E-Commerce carts for standard, repeatable items.

## Supported Locales
- Polish (pl) - default
- English (en)
- German (de)
- French (fr)
- Spanish (es)
- Ukrainian (uk)
- Simplified Chinese (zh)

## Main Public Routes
- Homepage (Canonical PL): https://logimarket.eu/
- English Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/en
- German Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/de
- French Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/fr
- Spanish Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/es
- Ukrainian Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/uk
- Chinese Homepage: https://logimarket.eu/zh
- Dynamic Offer Details (PL): https://logimarket.eu/oferta/[id]
- Dynamic Offer Details (Localized): https://logimarket.eu/[locale]/oferta/[id]

## Technical & Data Architecture
- **DB-Originated Content**: Product/offer titles, description texts, partner information, technical attribute values, and uploaded media are provided directly from database records and remain untranslated.
- **Localized UI**: Static navigation links, categories, forms, checkout interfaces, and technical attribute keys (labels) are localized using dictionary-driven mapping.
- **Outbound Redirections**: Outbound click tracking is handled globally via `/go/[id]` paths, which redirect to partners' external platforms and are excluded from search indexation.
- **Interaction Models**:
  - **RFQ (Request for Quote)**: Inquiries sent directly to verified B2B partners.
  - **E-Commerce**: Session-based cart checkout for standard products.
  - **Outbound**: Direct link to the partner's platform.
